summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sunday School lesson-centric 'Now/Next/After' refactor. Backend APIs 100% passing (23/23 tests). Frontend successfully implements all lesson-centric features: Now tab with Join Live/Zoom, Next tab with YouTube embed and Teacher Notes (markdown rendered), After tab with Resources, Discussion prompts with tabs, Reply submission, Reading Plan, and Mark Attendance.

issues: Mobile bottom navigation bar is present but partially obscured by 'Made with Emergent' badge

passed_tests: Backend: Authentication (member, teacher, admin login) - 5/5 tests
Backend: Lessons API (get next, get by ID, get all) - 3/3 tests
Backend: Teacher Prompts API (get prompts, prompts in lesson response) - 2/2 tests
Backend: Prompt Replies API (get replies, submit reply) - 2/2 tests
Backend: Attendance API (record all 4 action types, get my attendance, attendance in lesson) - 6/6 tests
Backend: Courses API (get all, get by ID) - 2/2 tests
Backend: Chat API (get messages, send message) - 2/2 tests
Backend: Resources in lesson response - 1/1 test
Frontend: Login and authentication flow
Frontend: Dashboard redirects to current lesson (first visit welcome screen)
Frontend: Lesson page NOW tab - Join Live button with Zoom link visible
Frontend: Lesson page NOW tab - 'You joined live!' status indicator
Frontend: Lesson page NOW tab - Live Chat link
Frontend: Lesson page NEXT tab - YouTube video embed working
Frontend: Lesson page NEXT tab - 'Watched' status indicator
Frontend: Lesson page NEXT tab - Teacher Notes with markdown rendering (bold, lists, italics)
Frontend: Lesson page AFTER tab - Slides & Resources section
Frontend: Lesson page AFTER tab - Discussion section with Prompt 1/Prompt 2 tabs
Frontend: Prompt tabs switching - changes active prompt question
Frontend: Reply input form visible and functional
Frontend: Reply submission - 'Response submitted!' toast shown
Frontend: New replies appear in the list after submission
Frontend: Reading Plan section with daily scripture readings
Frontend: Mark Attendance section with 'You're marked as attended!' status
Frontend: Mobile responsiveness - Now/Next/After tabs visible on mobile
Frontend: Mobile bottom navigation bar visible (Home, Courses icons)
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in CourseDetail.jsx and LessonDetail.jsx for missing useEffect dependencies - minor, not blocking
seed_data_creation: Seed data already exists with lesson 'The Good News', teacher prompts, and sample replies
context_for_next_testing_agent: All lesson-centric features working. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_lesson_centric.py covers auth, lessons, prompts, replies, attendance, courses, chat. Frontend tested with Playwright for login, dashboard, lesson page tabs (Now/Next/After), prompt switching, reply submission, reading plan, attendance marking, and mobile responsiveness.
